name: TIKTOK ADS COURSE
title: The Complete TikTok Ads Setup Guide
subtitle: Step-by-Step Training to Launch Profitable TikTok Ads
description: Learn how to properly set up TikTok ads from scratch and launch campaigns that can generate leads, sales, and business growth. This course breaks down the ad setup process in a simple and practical way, so you can confidently create, structure, and run TikTok campaigns that actually perform.

name: META ADS COURSE
title: The Complete Meta Ads Setup Guide
subtitle: Step-by-Step Training to Launch Profitable Meta Ads
description: Master the complete setup process for Facebook and Instagram ads with this practical beginner-friendly training. You’ll learn how to structure campaigns the right way, avoid costly setup mistakes, and launch Meta ads designed to attract leads, drive conversions, and grow your business.

name: GOOGLE ADS COURSE
title: The Complete Google Ads Setup Guide
subtitle: Step-by-Step Training to Launch Profitable Google Ads
description: This course teaches you how to correctly set up Google Ads campaigns so you can reach the right audience, drive quality traffic, and generate profitable results. From campaign structure to launch, you’ll learn the practical steps needed to run Google ads with more confidence and clarity.
